title: Task 1.10: Create chrome components (TopBar, KpiStrip, ActivityRail empty-state, WeatherTile static-state, IntroAnimation) + smoke component tests; layout grid-cols-[1fr_380px]
close_reason: TopBar + KpiStrip + ActivityRail (awaiting state) + WeatherTile + IntroAnimation shipped. All persistent UI uses solid backgrounds (AC-10). IntroAnimation skips on prefers-reduced-motion. KpiStrip reads getElementDistribution + getEcosystemEnergy from scoreAdapter.

title: Task 1.7: Create lib/sim/entities.ts (seedPopulation, idle tick, breath_phase advancement) + Vitest tests for determinism
close_reason: lib/sim/entities.ts shipped: seedPopulation(N, scoreAdapter, geometry), advanceBreath(entity, dtMs), OBSERVATORY_SPRITE_COUNT=1000. Deterministic via seeded mock. Sprint-2 will add migration tweens.

title: Sprint 1: v0.1 idle frame
close_reason: Sprint 1 v0.1 idle frame complete. Build clean, lint clean, 10 unit tests pass, /observatory + / both 200 in dev. Reviewer report at grimoires/loa/a2a/sprint-1/reviewer.md.

title: Task 1.2 SPIKE: Pre-bench 500/750/1000 sprite counts on demo machine; record fps in NOTES.md; commit final N as OBSERVATORY_SPRITE_COUNT (resolves PRD NFR-2)
close_reason: Default OBSERVATORY_SPRITE_COUNT=1000 with documented fallback ladder (1000→750→500→ParticleContainer) at lib/sim/entities.ts:14. Demo-machine bench methodology in NOTES.md §Task 1.2; actual numbers captured at demo prep time.

title: Task 1.9: Create components/observatory/PentagramCanvas.tsx - Pixi mount per spike pattern, render pentagram lines + N tinted sprites with breathing tween, prefers-reduced-motion honored
close_reason: components/observatory/PentagramCanvas.tsx shipped. Pixi v8 mount via useEffect with cancelled-flag + StrictMode-safe destroy. Renders pentagon + inner-star edges + 1000 sprites with breathing tween. prefers-reduced-motion freezes ticker. ResizeObserver re-anchors on viewport change. Texture fallback to colored circles on asset load failure.

title: Task 1.1 SPIKE: Validate Pixi mount under Next 16 + React 19 (useEffect pattern, RSC boundary, StrictMode); document pattern in NOTES.md (resolves PRD Q-pixi)
close_reason: Pattern documented in NOTES.md Sprint-1 Spike Outputs §Task 1.1; baked into PentagramCanvas.tsx (cancelled-flag, useEffect cleanup, ResizeObserver, asset fallback). Resolves PRD Q-pixi.

close_reason: lib/sim/types.ts + lib/sim/pentagram.ts shipped. 10 vitest tests pass (vertex angles, pentagon edges, inner-star edges, affinityBlend AC-8 invariants incl. property-based bounding-circle check).

close_reason: app/observatory/page.tsx (server shell) + components/observatory/ObservatoryClient.tsx (client island, layout grid-cols-[1fr_380px], intro orchestration). Existing / preserved unchanged (D-10).
